## Summary

Describe the change.

## Related Issue

Closes #

## Type of Change

- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Test
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Build / CI
- [ ] Release

## Checklist

- [ ] I created a branch before making changes.
- [ ] I did not commit directly to `main`.
- [ ] I used this pull request template.
- [ ] I linked the relevant issue where possible.
- [ ] I added or updated tests.
- [ ] I updated documentation if needed.
- [ ] I updated `CHANGELOG.md` if needed.
- [ ] I ran `mvn clean verify`.
- [ ] I did not include names of AI tools, assistants, or automation systems in the PR title, PR body, commit messages, code, comments, documentation, changelog entries, or release notes.
- [ ] I did not expose API tokens, secrets, private keys, account IDs, database IDs, customer data, or sensitive data.
- [ ] I did not add new runtime dependencies without an issue and maintainer approval.

## Testing

Describe how this was tested.

```bash
mvn clean verify
```

Add any additional context for reviewers.
